stepTitle: Probability For a New One-Hit-Wonders Game
stepBody:
Suppose that Gisella attends a new One-Hot Wonders game. At the beginning of the game,
she counts three opponent fans and one fan for the One-Hot Wonders. Use Gisella’s fitted
logistic regression model to compute the probability $$p$$ that the One-Hot wonders win the
competition.
